name: Processa Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Processa Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a pipeline of Next Generation Cancer therapy (NGC) small molecules, one of which is in a Phase 2 trial and the other in pre-clinical development. The company also has two non-oncology drug assets, PCS12852 for gastroparesis and PCS499 for primary glomerular disease, which it is exploring for out-licensing or partnership. Its risk-mitigated strategy is to identify existing cancer therapies with well-understood mechanisms that are highly toxic and to modify their metabolism or distribution to improve therapeutic effect and reduce toxicity.
sellsTo: patients with advanced or metastatic breast cancer
patients with various cancers such as breast, colorectal, gastrointestinal, and pancreatic
patients with primary glomerular disease such as FSGS and IgA

exposures.sentence: We are a publicly listed clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company.
On August 7, 2025, we announced that we were evaluating corporate digital asset treasury strategies as part of our broader financial and growth objectives.

catalysts.event: First formal interim analysis of Phase 2 trial of NGC-Cap in advanced or metastatic breast cancer patients
catalysts.sentence: We have enrolled and dosed the 20 patients required for the planned first formal interim analysis, which is expected to be completed in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Potential addition of a third treatment arm in Phase 2 trial after interim analysis
catalysts.sentence: Once the data is reviewed the potential addition of a third treatment arm (a second dosage regimen of NGC-Cap) may be added and enrollment of the study will reopen.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. capecitabine market was valued at approximately USD 408.2 million in 2022 and is expected to reach USD 652.9 million by 2032, reflecting a CAGR of 4.9%.
tamClaims.sentence: 2022: The U.S. capecitabine market was valued at approximately USD 408.2 million (GMI Insights, 2023). 2032 Projection: The market is expected to reach USD 652.9 million, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.9% from 2023 to 2032 (GMI Insights, 2023).

tamClaims.claim: The global irinotecan market was valued at approximately USD 9.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach around USD 14.7 billion by 2032, reflecting a CAGR of 6.5%.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2023, the market was valued at approximately USD 9.2 billion and is projected to reach around USD 14.7 billion by 2032, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.5% during this period (Dataintelo, 2024).

tamClaims.claim: Global prevalence of gastroparesis is over 30 million, with a diabetic population of over 8 million.
tamClaims.sentence: Global prevalence of gastroparesis is over 30 million, with a diabetic population of over 8 million (Delveinsight).
